manifest.seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte, then 3-byte, each bucket big-endian
manifest.match_rule: generated SHA-256(seed) prefixes are compared directly against raw target bytes
manifest.selection_rule: top depth-2 null/frontier rows by prefix>=4, with raw controls restricted to profitable span lengths
manifest.scope: bounded depth-3 exact discovery only; not `.tlmr` format support

summary.conclusion: Depth-3 frontier exact discovery found prefix movement only; exact seed-span records remain absent.
